revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-4-290

A split-phase motor in which a reactor is normally connected in series with the main primary winding, and in which the auxiliary primary winding and the reactor are energised only during the starting operation.

{{IALAFooter}}
